final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: scientific-visualization
Asset type: astronomical illustration, educational poster
Primary request: dramatic visualization of the Milky Way's galactic center featuring a supermassive black hole with gravitational lensing effects
Scene/backdrop: deep space void as base, dense star field with billions of stars, collision of two distant galaxies creating tidal tails
Subject: supermassive black hole at center surrounded by a blazing hot accretion disk emitting intense orange-red and white radiation, Einstein ring formed by gravitational lensing bending background starlight
Style/medium: Hubble Space Telescope and James Webb Space Telescope photographic style, scientific visualization combined with astronomical photography, photorealistic space imagery
Composition/framing: wide cosmic vista, central black hole as focal point with symmetrical gravitational lensing, sweeping view from galactic core to distant merging galaxies
Lighting/mood: dramatic high-contrast cosmic lighting, intense radiation glow from accretion disk, scattered starlight across deep black void, awe-inspiring and scientifically accurate
Color palette: deep space black base, orange-red and white accretion disk glow, blue-white young hot stars, orange-red elderly giant stars, red orange and purple emission nebula hues
Materials/textures: glowing gaseous accretion disk, wispy nebula gas pillars extending from edges, smooth gravitational lensing distortion, countless pinpoint stars
Constraints: maintain scientific accuracy of black hole physics and gravitational lensing, preserve Hubble/JWST photographic aesthetic, keep Einstein ring clearly visible
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, inaccurate black hole depiction, cluttered composition obscuring gravitational lensing, oversaturated neon colors, visible noise artifacts
